text.title: max-turns-circuit-breaker Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 high-impact failure modes for max-turns-circuit-breaker with detectors and fixes that map back to rules in 01-core-rules.xml.

antipattern.root-cause: No max_turns set; framework default unlimited.
antipattern.fix: Set max_turns per agent_kind; refuse to boot without it.
antipattern.detector: Inject an infinite-loop tool; verify cap fires.

antipattern.symptom: MaxTurnsExceeded bubbles as 500 to the user
antipattern.fix: Catch the exception; render a structured fallback to user; log partial trajectory.
antipattern.detector: Force the exception; verify graceful response.

antipattern.root-cause: Recovery model defaulted to the same expensive model as the agent.
antipattern.fix: Force recovery_model to haiku-class; cap recovery at 1 LLM call.

antipattern.symptom: Cap too high; user waits 90s for a failure
antipattern.root-cause: max_turns=50 even for a retrieval agent.
antipattern.fix: Pin caps to ranges (5-10 retrieval, 15-20 coding); CI lints against >20.
antipattern.detector: Per-failure latency; should be ≤ cap × per-turn-latency.
